title: Aetherseekers
description: A Minecraft Fantasy Rp Modpack. For the Aetherseekers Minecraft Server.
body:
🐲 **1. Mythical Creatures & Fantasy Worldbuilding**

The modpack heavily expands the world with magical and legendary creatures:

Included features:

Ice and Fire CE
→ Dragons, trolls, cyclopes, hippocampi, sirens and more.

Mythic Mounts
→ Rideable fantastical creatures like griffins, raptors, lunar deer, hippocamps, etc.

RPG Minibosses
→ Random elite enemies that create challenges and mini-encounters.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🔮 **2. Magic, Powers & RPG Progression**

Several mods introduce or support magical gameplay systems:

Berserker from the More RPG Classes series

Wizards from the RPG Series and many more

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
⚔️ **3. Weapons, Equipment & Combat Additions**

The combat system is enriched with many new weapons and tools:

Marium's Soulslike Weaponry

MCDW (Minecraft Dungeons Weapons)
→ Bows, glaives, hammers, scythes, sabers, and more.

Things, ItemsDisplayed
→ More RPG-style items and decorative equipment.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🏰 **4. Farming & Cooking**

Food and farm mods add more realism and roleplay depth:

Farmers Delight

Farm and Charm

Croptopia

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎭 **5. Player Expression & Social Roleplay**

Expressive gameplay is essential for RP, and this modpack includes:

Emotecraft
→ Gestures, dances, reactions for natural social interaction.

Simple Voice Chat
→ Proximity voice chat perfect for immersive storytelling.

3D Skin Layers
→ Clothing, armor details, hair, and accessories appear in three dimensions.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🏘 **6. Building, Decorating & RP Locations**

To support your building experience and server storytelling:

Building But Better
→ New types of blocks for your building purposes

Supplementeries & Amendments
→ New functional and decorative Blocks

Blockus and many more
→ New blocks and blockvarients

Resource packs & shaders:

GigasBountiful(A Resource pack for a german translation as well as new Names for the jobs in the Bountiful Mod created by me CoolGigas)

Complementary Unbound Shader(A cool Shader i really like)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
📦 **7. RPG Frameworks & Technical Enhancements**

Libraries and frameworks like Architectury, AzureLib, CraterLib, and others support:

advanced animations

complex mobs

better item behavior

improved mod compatibility

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎯 **Overall Summary — What This Modpack Adds**

✨ A fully realized fantasy RPG world with mythical creatures, magic, and rich environments.
⚔️ Deep combat and class identity with new weapons and magical abilities.
🎭 Strong roleplay tools like emotes, voice chat, and 3D skin enhancements.
🌍 A more immersive world with new biomes, towns, dungeons, foods, and cultures.
🏘 Tools for building large settlements, guild halls, and RP regions.


Mods from Curseforge used:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stackablepotions

The Shaderpack i put in here as recommendation (but i added the modded ores to the shader):
https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound
